# BlazorDX

> A secure-by-default, headless, AOT-safe Blazor component system for .NET 10. MIT-licensed,
> with zero runtime reflection (C# source generators), a Rust/WebAssembly compute tier, and a
> thin TypeScript DOM bridge. ~95 components built on one headless engine. Currently a beta
> preview, built with substantial AI assistance — not intended for production use.

## Docs
- [Documentation](https://blazordx.com/docs): Component catalog, guides, and architecture.
- [DataGrid](https://blazordx.com/grid): Flagship grid — 100k rows, Rust-backed sort/filter/aggregate.
- [Forms + AI](https://blazordx.com/forms): One model renders a form and a Model Context Protocol tool.
- [Charts](https://blazordx.com/charts): SVG charts, gauges, and sparklines.

## Project
- [Support](https://blazordx.com/support): Community, priority, enterprise/SLA, and consulting.
- [Privacy](https://blazordx.com/privacy): What the site collects (essentially nothing) and your rights.
- [Source on GitHub](https://github.com/logixrcorp/BlazorDX): MIT-licensed source, issues, releases.

## Notes
- License: MIT (owned by Logixr Corp).
- Status: beta / AI-generated / not for production use.
